experiments.name: Keyboard Shortcut Safe Error Handling
experiments.description: Wraps both getAction() and fn() in a single try-catch so that exceptions never prevent callers from running their cleanup (e.g. event.preventDefault / stopPropagation).

variants.name: Control
variants.description: Original behaviour — try-catch only around fn() call.

variants.name: Safe error handling
variants.description: Expanded try-catch covers both getAction() and fn() so callers always continue.
